title: B-Great Ankle Band for Men and Women Compatible with Fitbit Flex 2/One/Zip/Charge 2 3/Alta HR or Garmin Vivofit/2/3/4/JR Fitness Tracker
description: Comfortable to wear activity tracker around your ankle - keep tracks of ALL your steps while exercising (like on a treadmill, or pushing a grocery cart, or ridding a bike, etc). The band attach a mesh pouch to hold your tracker and that closed with a touch fastener inside, so you don't have to worry about your tracker slipping out any more.Very soft, light-weight, even you don't notice it's there. Easy to use with snaps closure and adjust size. 100% man made, very durable. At present, our ankle band compatible with the following models: Fitbit Flex, Fitbit Flex 2Fitbit OneFitbit ZipFitbit Charge 2 or Charge 3 (Not Charge or Charge HR) Fitbit Alta, Fitbit Alta HR Fitbit Inspire, Fitbit Inspire HRGarmin Vivofit/ 2/ 3/ 4/ JRMisfit Shine, Misfit Shine 2Sony SmartbandOther bullet style activity tracker..... How to detect your heart rate with this ankle band?To track heart rate, just simply flip over your fitness tracker and put it into the mesh pouch, make sure the heart rate monitor face up to your ankle skin, it will detect your heart rate through the small mesh holes and works fine.
features: Allow you wear activity tracker around your ankle and get more accurate steps
Compatible with Fitbit, Garmin, Misfit, Sony or other bullet style activity tracker
Soft and comfortable fit, does not irritates skins, easy to use with snap closure
Keep your tracker secure in the mesh pouch that closed with a touch fastener
Package inlcude only one piece ankle band, not include tracker or other parts

reviews.title: Very accurate on counting steps
reviews.text: I'm happy I found this! In my opinion, it is way more accurate than wearing my Fitbit on my wrist. I've gone from thinking I was a snail and not moving most days to a walking whiz! Just keep in mind if you are out in public with pants that don't cover it, folks may look at you. It looks a little like an electronic monitoring bracelet. Which is fun to me. Let them wonder what I've been up to.....

reviews.title: Heart rate not detectable most of the time
reviews.text: It's nice for working out. But it does not track heart rate with a darn. Lights facing in though the mesh tight on the skin and nadda. A big disappointment. Directly on the skin, adjusted all around. Charge 3

reviews.title: Didn't count steps
reviews.text: I used this for a few weeks because I didn't feel my band was counting steps when I was shopping or carrying something.  I was very surprised to see that after a full day out-and-about I had under 300 steps on the counter.  That's roughly what I would normally have when I got up to get my morning coffee.  I tried re-adjusting and tried the other leg, but got the same result.  I'm back to keeping my tracker on my wrist.  Disappointed.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Lightweight
reviews.text: I love this! It is exactly what I need to help me keep moving and to accurately register steps as I work to increase my activity! The band is light and very comfortable. I hardly even notice that I have it on. The band does have some stretch to it which helps in making it easy to put on.

reviews.title: Works great!
reviews.text: This band has helped me continue to get my steps when I am watching and carrying grandchildren, pushing a stroller or grocery cart, doing a lot of carrying around the house...I love it!  It is comfortable and secure!  With four snaps I can't imagine how you could lose it!

reviews.title: My Approach S6 -- Near Perfection!
reviews.text: Very pleased with the quality of this band replacement for my Approach S6 band and the ease of installation. Having a buddy helps, but the installation is easily accomplished on your own within a matter of minutes.  The new band is more flexible than the original which, IMHO, is a plus.  What I can't say is that the original band might have stiffened with age.  Who knows and it doesn't matter.  The screwdrivers are also an awesome design -- the handle ends have a hex shape you can stick in your drill if your hands are weak.  The only minuscule minus is that the retainer bar/strap is a tad large as others have stated, but problem solved by reusing the retainer strap from the original band. VERY pleased with this purchase.

title: Kimnix Smart Watch 2022(Make Call Receive/Dial), 1.72 in HD Full Touch Screen Fitness Tracker with Bluetooth Call/Text/Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep Monitor Smartwatch for Android iOS Mens Women (Black)

reviews.title: Fair features for the price
reviews.text:
First of all, you must keep in consideration that this is a $50 watch. That being said I will state what I consider are the pros and cons:

Pros
Price, battery life (more than the typical 1-day of apple watches), capable of answering and dialing within the watch (Bluetooth required) and blood oxygen and heart rate sensors.

Cons
Strap does not hold to watch and you must keep correcting it (solved with another strap?), blood pressure monitor? How???, you only have five watch faces at any given time but you can only replace one of the five - the others are permanently set, you get to edit the fourth one by adding a photo

Overall, there are cheaper and better watches like the WYZE (which I own and has better quality) but lack the phone answering and dialing features.

I will be replacing the strap with another type to see if it holds.

reviews.title: It does not keep all of the apps current. That is what I bought it for.
reviews.text: I bought this watch per my doctors request to keep health issues.  I only use it for this feature.  But to my amazement, It does not do as it states.  As I use only the medical aspects only I would expect it to work perfectly.

reviews.title: A good knock off
reviews.text: For the money this is a good watch

Featuring a bright color display, the Venu Sq – Music Edition GPS smartwatch combines daily style and on-device music storage with health monitoring and fitness features that inspire you to keep moving. Never miss a call or text with smart notifications delivered to your wrist (when paired with a compatible smartphone). Download music for phone-free listening, and breeze through checkout lines and select transit systems with Garmin Pay contactless payments (with a supported payment network). reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

reviews.title: Exelente
reviews.text: La bateria me dura 14 dias. Pantalla se ve perfectamente bajo el sol. La app connect trabaja muy bien, en la tienda puedo descargar pantallas para el reloj. Resto de las actividades ok. Lo recomiendo

reviews.title: Large Screen-Bright White Band
reviews.text: I like everything about this except that I didn’t realize that the frame and the band would be a Brilliant white! There is a golden strip surrounding the watch face.

reviews.title: The watch does a lot
reviews.text:
UPDATE: I was to early in writing my review. What I have noticed today is if Watch Call is connected to Bluetooth, you cannot use “Hey Siri” on the phone. So I disconnected Watch Call from Bluetooth and I could use Siri. However, now I can’t get Watch Call to reconnect to
Bluetooth. I have powered the watch off and on and that hasn’t helped. If Watch Call has to be reset each and every time to connect that is a deal
breaker. I will reach out to the seller, but it’s more likely I will return.

It’s a little larger than what I wanted, but overall it’s a nice watch. EXCEPT, the manual is Awful. It leaves so much out where you have to spend so much time trying to figure things out.

reviews.title: Bluetooth
reviews.text: What this product doesn't state is that while the watch is connected to your phone it will not let you to connect to wireless earbuds, wireless speakers, or even hear you Dexcom alarm!! Dexcom warns diabetics of high and low blood sugar levels. It's extremely important to hear those alarms. I didn't reach out to the seller but while you can disconnect the phone to get earbuds to work that means all features of the phone doesn't work.

reviews.title: Get lot's of compliments

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch3 2020 Smartwatch (Bluetooth + Wi-Fi + GPS) International Model (Bronze, 41mm)
description: The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps. Larger screen, but lighter and thinner for more comfort: With its subtle rotating bezel, it's easier to see and focus on what's important on an even larger screen. The Galaxy Watch3 is thinner and smaller, and up to 15% lighter with a sophisticated look that, thanks to its reduced frame, is perfect for the wrist. Breathe easier with built-in oxygen measurement: The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood. Because oxygen saturation is directly related to physical activity, you can use the Galaxy Watch3 to push your routine to the next level. Enjoy a better sleep: The Galaxy Watch3 records your active sleep, deep sleep, and total sleep time to keep track and improve the quality of your sleep. Samsung partnered with the National Sleep Foundation to include educational content and provide tips on your device to help you sleep better. Do your best and then repeat it: With over 120 home workout programs to choose from, the Galaxy Watch3 helps you move your body at your own pace. Pick one from your phone and stream it on your TV. It will show you your heart rate in real-time while you exercise. Use the Ridge Sport strap for even more accurate stats. Continue your conversations: When you receive a new message, the Galaxy Watch3 shows your conversation history so you can follow them. You can also view images without needing an extra touch, making it easier to keep up while you're working out. Add some context with the smart answer: Respond to messages at all times and without missing a beat. The Galaxy Watch3's smart reply analyzes the texts and photos you receive and gives you possible answers in different categories, such as food, celebrations, selfies and much more.

reviews.title: Awesome watch for the price!  On 2nd thought, maybe not so awesome
reviews.text:
I received this watch, opened it up and set it to charge for a couple of hours. I then followed the instructions to download the app onto my phone. I went to settings and pretty much turned the settings on for everything so that I could see if it would work. It does. I can check the weather, my temperature, blood pressure, oxygen, pulse and steps. I can set it to a sport activity and there are multiple ones. I was able to go to settings on the phone app and select 1 out of 152 different picture settings (and I can change it as much as I want to). It came with the 2 bands- pink and light brown or tan. I have only worn the pink band so far and it is soft. The charge on the battery lasted a week, which is nice because if you just remember to charge it for 2 hours once a week on the same day, that would be easy to remember. I have not really used the camera function but did somehow try it out as I twisted my wrist, and the phone camera took a picture. I have not used the music part of the watch either, but that is because I do not have a music option on my phone right now. The only issue that I had was connecting it to Google Fit so that I could attach that to the Walker Tracker App (which I use for competitions for # of steps). That is okay though because I can manually put the daily steps in. Overall, I would definitely recommend this watch. I have never had an Apple or Samsung Watch, but with this one, if it breaks, I won't be crying like I would with one of the expensive watches... and it works for what I want it for!

6/3/22- Update- this watch has been acting nuts the last 2 weeks. I was hoping it would work itself out, but it has not. The watch randomly buzzes and/or blinks. Sometimes it zeroes itself out. I am getting really frustrated. I have asked a question above to see if I can get help, so I will see what happens and let you know. I have only had it for maybe 6 weeks.

Amazing buy and I will be buying my children both one to monitor their sleep. Get it!!

reviews.title: Super great! As good or better than Apple Watch.
reviews.text: Great!

reviews.title: Warning: Do not trust medical readings!
reviews.text:
When I first opened this and changed the pink silicone strap to the rose gold steel strap, I thought it was pretty, albeit quite large for my tiny wrist. But I got this specifically for the health monitoring and wanted something that looked a little classy. Well, the only thing that reads correctly on my watch is the time.

I downloaded the app and it wants you to create an account and to allow access to everything personal on your phone. No thanks. I was not interested in receiving texts, calls, and alerts anyway. I just wanted to monitor my pulse, blood pressure, and steps. Everything else was supposed to be a bonus for me.

I had two separate doctor appointments yesterday and was alarmed when I compared the findings.
* Steps: When we discussed my new "smart"watch, the one doctor told me he's a runner and tries to get 10,000 steps daily even when he works. Apparently I walked about a third of that despite driving most of the day. GO ME!
* Temp: In the prior two days I wore this, my temperature has always read in the 95-96 degree range. Temp at both offices was NORMAL.
* O2 stats are probably ok, but that wasn't checked, at least that I paid attention to.
* BP: Here's a HUGE problem. It has consistently been reading at 128/76 +/- only 4 points on systolic or diastolic. But in both offices, my systolic was wrong by more than 30-35 points! I just came off BP medicine and needed to monitor it, so this was shocking, to say the least.
* Pulse: The other consistently incorrect reading. The watch has been reading between 90-110 at rest. This is alarmingly conceivable considering my health concern, which is why I went for one appointment to have it checked. However, after an EKG, my heart is fine and my pulse was actually around 70-80 at both offices after a little walking.
*Sleep: Since I have several issues with sleep, I looked forward to this info. Apparently I sleep while at my computer drinking coffee in the morning, as well as on part of my long drive home yesterday.

So not that it even matters at this point, but the location and weather would never "set" on the app or watch either, even though I specifically turned on my location just for your app. It just stayed blank with lines. I guess that's better than telling me it's snowing when it's really 70 degrees, considering your other reliable results.

Honestly, if you're going to market this as an activity tracker with health monitoring, then it should be able to give at least SOMEWHAT reliable readings. Mine weren't even close. I checked my temp, pulse, and BP manually the moment after it was taken in both offices to verify accuracy and it was so far off I thought I may be in jeopardy. So a big thank you for causing additional anxiety thinking my BP was only slightly high when it was way too high, and giving me tachycardia when it was only a bit elevated. Add my freezing temp and I should probably be close to death.

This is one of the most disturbing, nerve-wracking items I've ever gotten on Amazon. Or probably anywhere.

Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great replacement

reviews.text: It buckles instead of a clamp.. Is much better than the stock strap

reviews.title: Sturdy and a great replacement
reviews.text: My band broke and needed a new one.  This one was perfect and low price.  We will see how long it lasts, compared to the band it came with.

reviews.title: Cheep, stiff. Not comfortable like the Fitbit brand
reviews.text: Something must be wrong/incorrect with this design because the pins for the band DO NOT slide in efficiently into the Fitbit. This was a frustrating 15 minute ordeal to get the band out together and in the end I realized I placed the interchangeable pieces upside down. It’s such a pain in the butt I’m just going to have to flip my Fitbit for now. I have never had a band so difficult to install and as stated in the title this band is still, it’s not soft at all. I wouldn’t recommend.

reviews.title: good replacement band
reviews.text: It's a good bit better than the FitBit band that came with it!

title: Neitooh 4 Packs Bands Compatible with Fitbit Versa/Versa 2/Fitbit Versa Lite for Women and Men, Classic Soft Silicone Sport Strap Replacement Wristband for Fitbit Versa Smart Watch
description:
Neitooh Fitbit Versa Bands, Soft TPU Rubber Replacement Wristband for Women Men
Features:
Crafted from Premium durable TPU material. Very lightweight, flexible, easy cleanness, no fading. Soft and comfortable to wear.
Two Sizes Available for Fitbit Versa bands for women men：
Small size fits 5.5"-7.8" wrists; Large size fits 7.3"-9.2" wrists. Fitbit Versa Bands can be freely adjusted according to the circumstance of individual wrist.
Compatible Devices:
Fitbit Versa/Versa 2/Versa Lite Edition/Versa SE (Tracker is NOT included)
Wide Use:
Great for outdoor sports / business / parties / shopping /gifts ect. Women ,Men Girls, boys, kids, teens, and adults alike. No age limited, just limited for your wrist! Stay Stylish.
Easy to install:
Custom-Built quick release pins allow you to do fast, convenient regulation of Remove off / on. Longer life and more sturdy use for daily replace various colors bands.
How to install it:
1.Insert the pin into the indent.2.Press the pin to slide the top part into the corresponding indent.3.Check to see if it was attached to the watch.4.If not, try it again then push the pin into the indent
Package Content:
4 x Packs Soft TPU Replacement wristband for Fitbit Versa/Versa 2/Fitbit Versa Lite Smartwatch2 x Durable Spring pins
How to message us：

features: Buckle closure

【Replacement Band for Fitbit Versa】 Neitooh Fitbit Versa/Versa 2/Fitbit Versa Lite sports wristband is made of environmentally, skin-friendly and high quality TPE material, its food grade silicone and resistant to abrasion, high temperature, no smell, waterproof, no cracking, no irritating the skin, brings a comfortable wearing experience when you exercise or leisure moments. Please note that our bands are NOT FOR Fitbit Versa 3 / Fitbit Sense.

【Multi-color Choices, Two Sizes Available】 Available in multiple colors and two sizes are available for Fitbit Versa/Versa 2/Fitbit Versa Lite women men, freely adjustable stainless steel buckle holds Versa sturdily. You can choose according to dressing, daily mood, daily activities, fit for many scenes, even all kinds of intense sports, highlight your personal style. Each color is seemed like a brand new watch. Small size fits 5.5"-7.8" wrists; Large size fits 7.3"-9.2" wrists.

【Perfect Design for Fitbit Versa】 Upgraded and improved-built quick release pins allow you to do fast, convenient regulation of remove off/on, The stitches on both ends of the band are designed with the seamless joint technology. It can accurately and quickly lock the Fitbit Versa tracker without any tool to install and release. And, the robust design can ensure the bands securely attached without worrying about falling out.There are additional 2 watch lugs in every package.

【Ideal for Sports & Leisure】 Classic regular design for Fitbit Versa and Versa Lite and Special Edition. The wear-resistant, ventilated design allows the wrist to remain cool and dry and sweat-proof during exercise. Lightweight, it seem like nothing in your hands, help you feel comfortable in sports or leisure time. Neitooh Fitbit Versa bands personalize your Fitbit Versa to match your daily style in different occasions, which can create a high-fashion image and make you stand out of the crowd.

【Premium Waterproof Material 】Neitooh Fitbit Versa replacement bands are made of flexible elastomer, sweat-proof & waterproof, comfortable to wear. When they are dirty, you can use an old toothbrush with a little bit of laundry detergent and lightly brush your band, then rinse it off, pat dry with paper towel or napkin and leave it to air dry overnight.
